Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics Coaches Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

20 T.J. Berger

  • Position G
  • Height 6-4
  • Weight 195
  • Class Graduate Student
  • Hometown Malvern, Pa.
  • Highschool Westtown
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

Before SNHU/Personal
  • Sports Management Major
  • Son of Seth and Christelle
  • Has two brothers, Cole and Quin
  • 2020 graduate of Westtown School
  • Played basketball for the Moose
  • Academic distinction 3x (honor roll)
  • Team most improved,Team MVP, All-league 2x, All-area 3rd team
  • Transfer from Lafayette College
  • Career goal is to play professional basketball
  • Hobbies are Movies, TV shows, cooking
  • Favorite sports other than basketball are golf/tennis
  • Lists his favorite teams are 76ers, Eagles, Phillies
  • LeBron James is his favorite athlete
  • Favorite movie is About Time, and favorite musician is Drake
